dialog.stepLabel: Breen the Screen: "Beep... Behold! This is the Banner of Conquest, provided by ..."

items.text: You close your eyes. After a while, you begin to hear Breen the Screen's excited voice.

items.speaker: Breen the Screen
items.text: Beep... Behold! This is the Banner of Conquest, provided by the Septimont Agon Committee. Activate it, and it'll help you clear the Tacet Discords!

items.speaker: Breen the Screen
items.text: For these small banners, you can activate them directly.

items.speaker: Breen the Screen
items.text: A large banner like this can only be activated when no Tacet Discords are nearby. Of course, it'll provide a greater boost boost boost! Beep—

items.speaker: Breen the Screen
items.text: Caution caution caution! Some banners have been claimed by stronger enemies! Don't let your guard down! They're not easy to tackle! But if you can defeat them, we'll reclaim those areas!

items.speaker: Breen the Screen
items.text: These banners are scattered across the Old District, waiting for you to discover! Beep!

items.speaker: Breen the Screen
items.text: So, in this challenge, our goal is—

options.text: To defeat the enemies and claim victory.
To get the banners and reclaim the areas.

items.speaker: Breen the Screen
items.text: That's right! You caught on real quick! Onward, Fearless Gladiator! The banners stand tall, victory always calls! May you be showered in the cheers of triumph!
